title: Close weekly reviews and commercial signal loops
summary: Records release evidence for the new weekly Action Center digest and churn or upgrade commercial review endpoints, the dashboard Reviews workspace, and the matching execution board cleanup for the account-owner review loop.
completed_todo_items: Weekly action-center digest for account owners
Churn/upgrade review loop based on usage + billing signals

commands: npx playwright test tests/e2e/dashboard-product-paths.spec.ts --grep "finance role can review billing guardrails and export customer usage from billing|finance role can run the weekly reviews workflow from one page"

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the weekly digest and commercial review endpoints resolve scope-aware billing, team, and customer signals for billing-manager roles.

commands: npx playwright test tests/e2e/dashboard-product-paths.spec.ts --grep "finance role can review billing guardrails and export customer usage from billing|finance role can run the weekly reviews workflow from one page"
smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the Reviews page, finance-safe billing exports, and dashboard navigation stay buildable and reachable in the product-path harness.
Confirms the execution board closeout is backed by release evidence before coordination changes are pushed.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the review endpoints and dashboard review workspace if account-owner digest summaries or commercial signal classification regress in production.
